posts.author: EMWhite (Erin White)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’d love to be able to move things from Overdue to an “On Hold” group in the My Work view. This would be useful for things that we don’t want to fall off the plate, but we cannot do them right now. I know we can change the due date to get them to move into the future, but I don’t want to overwrite the original due date.

What are you trying to achieve

I’d love to be able to move things from Overdue to an “On Hold” group in the My Work view. This would be useful for things that we don’t want to fall off the plate, but we cannot do them right now. I know we can change the due date to get them to move into the future, but I don’t want to overwrite the original due date.
